response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, leadership, and large-scale systems, but his background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development and distributed systems rather than deep C++ expertise or cloud infrastructure leadership. His recent roles at Stripe and Shopify focus on TypeScript/Node.js rather than C++, and his cloud architecture experience is not explicitly highlighted in the resume. However, his leadership in mentoring, project management, and technical strategy is strong.
strengths: Proven leadership in technical projects and mentoring (e.g., organizing workshops, contributing to open-source projects)
Experience with distributed systems and high-performance databases (e.g., Sociomantic, Stripe)
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last notable C++ role was at National Instruments in 2015)
No explicit mention of cloud architecture or compute platform leadership in recent roles
Degree mismatch (Bachelor's in Computer Science, not advanced degrees as preferred)
